title: Morning Signal schedule manifest (v1)
description: Per-date content-override schedule read from S3 at generation time (schedule_override.load_schedule_override). DOCUMENTATION COPY: the enforced validator is the dependency-free schedule_override.validate_schedule_manifest, duplicated identically in the console producer (alpha-engine-dashboard loaders/morning_signal_schedule.py); the per-repo contract tests run both copies over the shared fixtures in tests/fixtures/schedule/. Unknown fields are ignored by consumers (additive-forward).

topic.description: Required + non-empty for override/extend; optional for skip.

guidance.description: Freeform operator prompt text (for skip: the reason). Optional.

editions.description: Matched against the LITERAL run edition arg. Default ["am"] for override/extend, ["am","pm"] for skip. Weekend runs are invoked with edition="am".

keywords.description: Search-coverage guard keywords; derived from topic tokens when absent.

min_searches.description: Coverage guard min_matches. Default 3 for override, 1 for extend; unused for skip.
